commit.subject: LU-17875 test: skip 154b on SLES15
commit.message:
LU-17875 test: skip 154b on SLES15

Due to the issue of LU-15259, setacl of 154b fails due to using
an non-existing user. This patch simply skips the test case.
To enable the test case together with other similar ones,
patches from LU-16673 and LU-15259 need to be applied.

Signed-off-by: Li Xi <lixi@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I952e6e9c0b7c63a456abf91e8e6a9bad8e36bea6
